title: warden dimension
description: adds a warden dimension and adds flowers and stuff.
body:
ADDS THE WARDEN DIMENSION ask me on my yt if you want more updates

mod

to get to the warden dimension craft a portal igniter with sculk and obsidian and light the portal BUT make sure there is no sculk veins in the way and the portal is the one in the city.
